active_franchise.franchise_name: Zero no Tsukaima: The Halkeginia Saga
active_franchise.multiverse_rules: Halkeginia is a continent where Nobles can use magic and commoners cannot. Magic is based on the four elements (Fire, Water, Earth, Wind). A lost fifth element, Void Magic, exists but is forbidden. Humans from Earth ('Earthlings') can be summoned as familiars and granted powerful runes (e.g., Gandalfr, the left hand of God).

campaigns.cosmology: The player is a custom Original Character (OC) who was either summoned from Earth as a Familiar alongside Saito, or is a disgraced Noble student at the Tristain Magic Academy. The world follows D&D mechanics but re-skinned: Arcane casters are Nobles, Martials are Familiars/Commoners.
core_cast: Louise Françoise Le Blanc de La Vallière
campaigns.endgame_resolution: Defeating the Ancient Dragon and preventing the Pope's crusade from destroying both Halkeginia and Earth.

seasons.season_theme: Academy Life, Political Espionage, and the Reconquista Rebellion
seasons.world_state: The Tristain Academy is peaceful, but rumors of the Albion rebellion and a rogue faction called Reconquista are spreading.

big_bad_evil_guy.name: Wardes (Captain of the Magic Guard)
big_bad_evil_guy.motivation: To kidnap Queen Henrietta and steal the Water Ruby for the Reconquista.

arcs.overarching_goal: Establish the Player Character's role at the Academy and bond with a master or familiar.

arc_climax.description: A duel on the academy courtyard against Guiche and his summoned Valkyrie Golems.
arc_climax.win_condition: Defeat Guiche's Golems. The OC unlocks their first class ability or familiar rune.
arc_climax.loss_condition: Humiliation. The OC is forced to do the Academy's laundry for a month, losing reputation.

quests.title: Familiar Registration
quests.plot_hook: The OC must complete a maze in the Academy dungeons to prove their worth to the professors.

encounters.description: Navigate a shifting maze guarded by low-level earth golems.

arcs.arc_title: The Tarbes Village Incident & The Thief
arcs.overarching_goal: Recover the Staff of Destruction (a Rocket Launcher) from the thief Fouquet.

arc_climax.description: Boss fight against Fouquet and her massive 30-foot Earth Golem.
arc_climax.win_condition: Destroy the golem's core and capture Fouquet.
arc_climax.loss_condition: Fouquet escapes with the staff, causing massive destruction to the village.

season_finale_consequences.world_changes: War is declared between Tristain and the rebel forces of Albion.

seasons.season_title: Quest Book 2: Knight of the Twin Moons
seasons.world_state: Tristain is actively at war. The Academy has been militarized.

big_bad_evil_guy.name: Cromwell
big_bad_evil_guy.motivation: To conquer Tristain using the Ring of Andvari.

arcs.overarching_goal: Hold off the 70,000 strong Albion army so Queen Henrietta can evacuate.

arc_climax.description: Stand alongside Saito to hold the chokepoint against waves of Dragon Knights.
arc_climax.win_condition: Survive 5 rounds of combat until the Void Magic spell 'Explosion' is charged.
arc_climax.loss_condition: The OC 'dies' holding the line, but is resurrected by Tiffania later (plot armor mechanic).

seasons.world_state: The war is over, but Saito's runes have vanished. King Joseph of Gallia is making moves.

big_bad_evil_guy.name: King Joseph of Gallia
big_bad_evil_guy.motivation: To plunge the world into chaos because he lacks the ability to feel emotion.

arcs.overarching_goal: Infiltrate the Kingdom of Gallia to rescue the OC's classmate, Tabitha.

arc_climax.description: Fight Sheffield, the familiar of King Joseph, and her summoned monsters in the dungeon.
arc_climax.win_condition: Defeat Sheffield and break Tabitha's mind-control curse.

seasons.world_state: The Pope has declared a holy crusade to reclaim the Holy Land, which will drain Halkeginia's magic and destroy Earth.

big_bad_evil_guy.name: The Ancient Dragon
big_bad_evil_guy.motivation: Mindless destruction, controlled by the Pope.

arcs.overarching_goal: Defeat the Ancient Dragon before it passes through the dimensional gate to Earth.

arc_climax.description: The OC, riding a dragon or an F-2A fighter jet, intercepts the Ancient Dragon in the sky above the academy.
arc_climax.win_condition: Deal massive damage to the Dragon's core, allowing Louise to cast the ultimate Void spell 'Life'.
arc_climax.loss_condition: The dimensional gate collapses. Both worlds are destroyed.

arcs.character_growth_milestone: The OC reaches Level 20. If they are from Earth, they earn the choice to return home or stay in Halkeginia forever.
